headlines: A fire occurs at a chemical plant in Brunswick, Georgia, United States, prompting evacuations due to the danger of hazardous smoke and explosions. A firefighter is injured while fighting the fire.

events.text: Foreign aid to Ukraine during the Russo-Ukrainian War

Ukraine confirms that it has received the first delivery of the NASAMS surface-to-air missile system, which will "significantly strengthen" its armed forces, according to Defence Minister Oleksii Reznikov.
Ten people are killed by al-Shabaab militants at a military base in Galguduud, Somalia.
A fire occurs at a chemical plant in Brunswick, Georgia, United States, prompting evacuations due to the danger of hazardous smoke and explosions. A firefighter is injured while fighting the fire.
Algeria formally applies to join the BRICS economic group.
